config.slogan: 打开就会用的 AI 助理
config.target_audience: 希望像使用软件一样自然使用 AI 的普通用户。

website.heroDescription: iClaw 面向普通用户设计。少一点配置，多一点结果。打开、提问、执行、拿答案。
website.metaDescription: iClaw 官网，面向普通用户的本地 AI 客户端。

config.template: 请解读 #标的 最新财报，重点看收入增速、利润率、经营现金流、管理层指引和预期差。
请对 #标的 做估值分析，结合增长、盈利质量、可比公司估值和主要风险给出判断。
请对比 #标的1 和 #标的2 的商业模式、增长质量、估值水平和关键风险。
请从行业格局、政策驱动、盈利周期和估值水平出发，点评 #行业 的当前机会与风险。
请复盘今天市场，说明主要指数表现、领涨领跌板块、资金风格和背后驱动。
请分析 #基金 的投资范围、持仓风格、业绩表现、回撤风险、基金经理特征和适合的配置场景。
请围绕 #主题 输出 10 个适合小红书的内容选题。每个选题都给出目标人群、核心痛点、标题方向、适合的内容结构和建议标签。
请拆解这个小红书选题 #主题 下的爆款内容套路，从标题钩子、封面角度、开头切入、正文结构、结尾引导和评论区互动设计 6 个维度总结。
请对 #对标账号 或 #赛道 做小红书竞品分析，输出内容定位、更新频率、常见选题、标题风格、互动方式，以及我们可复用的 5 条打法建议。
请把这段草稿改写成适合小红书发布的笔记，输出标题、正文、分段结构、口语化表达、互动引导和建议标签。原始素材：#草稿
请针对这条小红书笔记的评论区，生成 10 条不同风格的回复话术，要求自然、不油腻、避免模板感，并区分答疑型、感谢型、引导私信型三类。主题：#主题
请围绕 #主题 生成 7 天小红书发布计划。每天给出内容主题、标题方向、内容形式、发布时间建议、互动目标和复盘指标。

latestVersion.changelog:
**Multi-search-engine v2.0.1 Changelog**

- Updated documentation for conciseness, focusing on essential usage, supported engines, operators, and example queries.
- Removed the file `references/advanced-search.md` to streamline advanced search documentation.
- Revised and unified description to highlight 17 search engines, advanced operators, privacy-focused engines, and knowledge computation.
- Cleaned up and reorganized SKILL.md; made operator and time filter tables clearer for easier reference.
- Updated metadata in config and documentation files for accuracy and clarity.

dimensions.detail: Name/description match the delivered artifacts: SKILL.md, config.json, and reference docs all describe URL templates for 17 search engines and advanced operators. The skill does not request unrelated binaries, env vars, or APIs.
dimensions.label: Purpose & Capability
dimensions.name: purpose_capability

dimensions.detail: Runtime instructions are limited to calling web_fetch with constructed search URLs (consistent with a search helper). However the documentation explicitly lists advanced operators (e.g., intext:password, cache:, inurl:login, filetype:txt) that can be used to locate sensitive content — the instructions include examples that could facilitate scraping of exposed credentials or private data if misused. The skill itself doesn't exfiltrate data, but it provides the means to formulate sensitive queries.
dimensions.label: Instruction Scope
dimensions.name: instruction_scope

dimensions.detail: No install spec and no code files — this is instruction-only and does not write binaries or fetch archives. Low installation risk.
dimensions.label: Install Mechanism
dimensions.name: install_mechanism

dimensions.detail: No environment variables, credentials, or config paths are requested. The declared requirements align with the documented functionality (public web searches require no API keys).
dimensions.label: Credentials
dimensions.name: environment_proportionality

dimensions.detail: always is false and the skill does not request any persistent system-level configuration. It is user-invocable and can be autonomously invoked by the agent per platform defaults (normal for skills).
dimensions.label: Persistence & Privilege
dimensions.name: persistence_privilege

llmAnalysis.guidance: This skill is coherent and functions as a set of search-URL templates and examples. Before installing, consider: (1) The agent will perform web fetches to third-party search engines — do not send secrets, private tokens, or internal-only URLs as keywords because those queries may be transmitted to external sites. (2) The documentation includes operators that can locate exposed credentials or cached pages; avoid using the skill to search for or harvest sensitive data. (3) The skill has no homepage and an unknown publisher ID — if provenance matters, verify the author or prefer a published source with traceable ownership. If you proceed, test with harmless queries and prefer privacy engines (DuckDuckGo, Startpage, Brave) for sensitive searches.
llmAnalysis.summary: The skill's files and runtime instructions are internally consistent with a multi-search integration: it only documents URL templates and web_fetch examples and does not request extra credentials or install anything.

vtAnalysis.analysis:
Type: OpenClaw Skill
Name: 
Developer: 
Version: 
Description: OpenClaw Agent Skill

The skill bundle provides a comprehensive integration and guide for using 17 search engines. All `web_fetch` examples and configured URLs point to legitimate search engine domains. While the documentation includes examples of advanced search operators that could be used for reconnaissance (e.g., `intext:password filetype:txt`), these are presented as illustrative examples of search queries, not as instructions for the AI agent to perform malicious actions or exfiltrate data. There is no evidence of prompt injection attempting to manipulate the agent's core behavior, data exfiltration, malicious execution, or persistence mechanisms across any of the analyzed files.

skill.summary: Multi search engine integration with 17 engines (8 CN + 9 Global). Supports advanced search operators, time filters, site search, privacy engines, and WolframAlpha knowledge queries. No API keys required.

latestVersion.changelog:
**Multi-search-engine v2.0.1 Changelog**

- Updated documentation for conciseness, focusing on essential usage, supported engines, operators, and example queries.
- Removed the file `references/advanced-search.md` to streamline advanced search documentation.
- Revised and unified description to highlight 17 search engines, advanced operators, privacy-focused engines, and knowledge computation.
- Cleaned up and reorganized SKILL.md; made operator and time filter tables clearer for easier reference.
- Updated metadata in config and documentation files for accuracy and clarity.

skill.summary: Multi search engine integration with 17 engines (8 CN + 9 Global). Supports advanced search operators, time filters, site search, privacy engines, and WolframAlpha knowledge queries. No API keys required.

referencedCloudSkills.name: Multi Search Engine

referencedCloudSkills.description: Self-reflection + Self-criticism + Self-learning + Self-organizing memory. Agent evaluates its own work, catches mistakes, and improves permanently. Use when...

latestVersion.changelog: Clarifies the setup flow for proactive follow-through and safer installation behavior.

dimensions.detail: The skill claims to build a local, self-improving memory and the SKILL.md only requires creating/reading files under ~/self-improving/ and updating workspace AGENTS.md/SOUL.md/HEARTBEAT.md non-destructively. No unrelated binaries, cloud credentials, or network tokens are requested. The declared configPaths match the described purpose.
dimensions.label: Purpose & Capability
dimensions.name: purpose_capability

dimensions.detail: Runtime instructions tell the agent to read/write ~/self-improving/*, load memory.md on session start, scan for changes, and append structured logs (corrections, reflections, heartbeats). They also instruct non-destructive edits to workspace files (AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, HEARTBEAT.md) and to run simple shell commands (mkdir, find) as part of setup. This behavior is consistent with the purpose but you should be aware the skill will read and write files in your home directory and may modify workspace files unless you decline that step.
dimensions.label: Instruction Scope
dimensions.name: instruction_scope

dimensions.detail: There is no install spec and no code files — the skill is instruction-only, which is low risk. The only network-related operation mentioned is an optional, consent-gated 'clawhub install proactivity' step; the SKILL.md explicitly says to only run that after the user agrees.
dimensions.label: Install Mechanism
dimensions.name: install_mechanism

dimensions.detail: The skill requires no environment variables or credentials. It will store user-provided corrections and preferences in local files; boundaries.md explicitly forbids storing secrets/credentials and describes consent and audit flows, which is appropriate for the stated functionality.
dimensions.label: Credentials
dimensions.name: environment_proportionality

dimensions.detail: The skill persists state locally under ~/self-improving/ (memory.md, corrections.md, heartbeat-state.md, etc.). always:false and normal model invocation are used. Persisting learned preferences and automatic heartbeat maintenance is expected for this class of skill, but it does create lasting local state and can modify workspace steering files non-destructively — worth awareness before enabling.
dimensions.label: Persistence & Privilege
dimensions.name: persistence_privilege

llmAnalysis.guidance: This skill is an instruction-only local memory/learning system and appears to do what it says: create and maintain ~/self-improving/ and update small workspace steering files non-destructively. Before installing or enabling it: (1) Confirm you are comfortable letting the agent read and write files under ~/self-improving/ and make limited edits to AGENTS.md/SOUL.md/HEARTBEAT.md; (2) Back up AGENTS.md and SOUL.md if you want an easy rollback; (3) Note the skill will not request credentials, but it will store user-provided corrections and preferences—review boundaries.md and ensure it meets your privacy expectations; (4) Only allow the optional 'Proactivity' companion to be installed if you review that skill first (it runs a network install); (5) Verify the skill's kill-switch and export/wipe flows work as promised (ask it to export and then to wipe on a test run) and limit file permissions on ~/self-improving/ if you want stricter local access control.
llmAnalysis.summary: The skill's requirements and instructions are coherent with its stated purpose: it is an instruction-only, local memory/learning helper that reads and writes a dedicated ~/self-improving/ workspace and may non-destructively update workspace steering files; it requests no credentials or exotic installs.

vtAnalysis.analysis:
Type: OpenClaw Skill
Name: self-improving
Version: 1.2.16

The skill implements a structured, tiered memory system designed to help the agent learn from user corrections and self-reflection. It manages local files in `~/self-improving/` and includes a robust 'Security Boundaries' document (`boundaries.md`) that explicitly forbids storing credentials, financial data, or PII. While the setup process involves modifying core workspace configuration files like `SOUL.md` and `AGENTS.md` to establish persistence and steering, these actions are transparently documented and strictly aligned with the stated purpose of improving agent performance over time.

owner.bio:
Releasing the agent skills and techniques behind some of the most used GPTs in the ChatGPT Store (@Widenex +10M chats, @Summarizer +1M chats).

I spent 2025 discovering the best use cases and instructions for agents.
Now, I’m releasing them to the world for free.

X: @ivangdavila

referencedCloudSkills.description: 查询指定城市或地区的天气预报信息，包括温度、天气状况、降水概率、风力风向等。支持实时天气和未来多日预报查询。

latestVersion.changelog:
- 本次为重大升级，全面提升天气查询和报告功能，界面与响应均优化为中文。
- 新增未来多日（1-7天）天气、空气质量、紫外线指数等详细查询能力。
- 增加智能分析和个性化出行建议（如温差、防晒、降水、风力、空气质量等）。
- 明确天气状况分类，自动生成重点提示与预警提醒（支持暴雨、台风等）。
- 报告产出结构化，包括实时天气、趋势概述、重点提示与建议，覆盖生活多场景需用。
- 完善数据产出规范及完整质检清单，保障查询结果准确、实用、易理解。

skill.summary: 查询指定城市或地区的天气预报信息，包括温度、天气状况、降水概率、风力风向等。支持实时天气和未来多日预报查询。

composerShortcuts.description: 快速比较两个公司或标的
composerShortcuts.template: 请对比 #标的1 和 #标的2 的商业模式、增长质量、估值水平和关键风险。

composerShortcuts.description: 快速发起财报质量和预期差分析
composerShortcuts.template: 请解读 #标的 最新财报，重点看收入增速、利润率、经营现金流、管理层指引和预期差。

composerShortcuts.description: 快速发起基金产品分析
composerShortcuts.template: 请分析 #基金 的投资范围、持仓风格、业绩表现、回撤风险、基金经理特征和适合的配置场景。

composerShortcuts.description: 快速复盘当日市场与风格变化
composerShortcuts.template: 请复盘今天市场，说明主要指数表现、领涨领跌板块、资金风格和背后驱动。

composerShortcuts.description: 快速发起行业机会与风险点评
composerShortcuts.template: 请从行业格局、政策驱动、盈利周期和估值水平出发，点评 #行业 的当前机会与风险。

composerShortcuts.description: 快速发起估值与可比公司分析
composerShortcuts.template: 请对 #标的 做估值分析，结合增长、盈利质量、可比公司估值和主要风险给出判断。

composerShortcuts.description: 批量生成自然、克制、带转化意图的评论区回复
composerShortcuts.template: 请针对这条小红书笔记的评论区，生成 10 条不同风格的回复话术，要求自然、不油腻、避免模板感，并区分答疑型、感谢型、引导私信型三类。主题：#主题

composerShortcuts.description: 对标账号或赛道内容打法，提炼可复用策略
composerShortcuts.template: 请对 #对标账号 或 #赛道 做小红书竞品分析，输出内容定位、更新频率、常见选题、标题风格、互动方式，以及我们可复用的 5 条打法建议。

composerShortcuts.description: 把草稿改写成适合小红书发布的图文或视频文案
composerShortcuts.template: 请把这段草稿改写成适合小红书发布的笔记，输出标题、正文、分段结构、口语化表达、互动引导和建议标签。原始素材：#草稿

composerShortcuts.description: 生成连续一周的小红书内容排期和执行建议
composerShortcuts.template: 请围绕 #主题 生成 7 天小红书发布计划。每天给出内容主题、标题方向、内容形式、发布时间建议、互动目标和复盘指标。

composerShortcuts.description: 围绕目标领域挖掘适合小红书的选题方向和标题角度
composerShortcuts.template: 请围绕 #主题 输出 10 个适合小红书的内容选题。每个选题都给出目标人群、核心痛点、标题方向、适合的内容结构和建议标签。

composerShortcuts.description: 拆解爆款笔记的标题、结构、钩子和互动设计
composerShortcuts.template: 请拆解这个小红书选题 #主题 下的爆款内容套路，从标题钩子、封面角度、开头切入、正文结构、结尾引导和评论区互动设计 6 个维度总结。
